{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323154017BDDABCDDA41EE2958D6B"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7594406920276017982","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"贴合联盟背景故事，这剧情推的是真快！看到周免篇了，反转真多。几乎没有长篇的感情戏，有也是一两句，很对胃口的一本！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768214384,"group_id":"7589139456838339609","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8nd0YUpVxwgcNlPNRM0mEk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/08700f9a86894954b156e69ea8aa8cff~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792307&x-signature=shUBw47%2FLou5XcmKouEQsTEun%2BY%3D","user_id":"995477106473015","user_name":"国服第一万上单"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"995477106473015","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"is_book_forum_operator","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5d5c4e7be80ba156a2703698120ff4e4","icon_width":64,"icon_height":23}","intro":"{"title_name":"运营官","title_detail":"《搞笑！这里是LOL世界？》的书圈运营官是一个珍贵的头衔，授予兼具创作力与责任心的书友，肩负活跃书圈的使命！","title_id":"is_book_forum_operator","big_icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0151264e36a6375ece6f9471ed95de86","detail_url":"dragon1967://webview?url=https%3A%2F%2Freading.snssdk.com%2Fwap%2Fbook-operator.html"}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"运营官","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"#5BA1E1"}","zh_title":"运营官"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7589139456838339609","book_info":{"abstract":"当第四天灾参与到英雄们的事件之中。一切都会因为蝴蝶效应而产生偏离。
斯维因政变之后，一个个英雄浮出水面，所有事件串联到一起。嘉文遇害，诺手入侵，弗雷尔卓德山崩，塔里克流放峰，蛤蟆的欲望，双城之战，祖安独立，妮蔻被捕，恕瑞玛飞升，攀登巨神，暗影岛黑雾，艾欧尼亚反击战等等故事接连不断。
这是一本讲述联盟世界的书，涉及整个大陆的山川地貌，风土人情，但最主要的是每个英雄的背景故事，他们都有着密不可分的联系，既然官方不给串联，那么我希望做一个串联。
时间线能不变就不变，改动部分我会注明。
最后，感谢观看，所有留言都会回复。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o01c2b33927e087fed5a0bae6a58607a7~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"zero龙","author_id":"","book_id":"7589139456838339609","book_name":"搞笑！这里是LOL世界？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#180810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7589425404763456025","read_count":"333","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"278499"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"110","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,诸天万界,穿越,系统","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o01c2b33927e087fed5a0bae6a58607a7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435617&x-signature=n20Y%2Fk%2BdFOA3yl5ScJH7jXzWuiE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"6285475914","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"169"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323154017BDDABCDDA41EE2958D6B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读12小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarde
